description: Append Kitchen Laboratory projection and bounded pre/post-action hooks to the canonical Kitchen room action

replacements.old:
(T
		      <TELL "slightly ajar." CR>)>
	       <HOUSE-STATE-PROJECT ,KITCHEN>)
	      (<EQUAL? .RARG ,M-ENTER>
	       <HOUSE-STATE-ENTER ,KITCHEN>)
	      (<==? .RARG ,M-BEG>
	       <COND (<AND <VERB? CLIMB-UP> <EQUAL? ,PRSO ,STAIRS>>
		      <DO-WALK ,P?UP>)
		     (<AND <VERB? CLIMB-UP> <EQUAL? ,PRSO ,STAIRS>>
		      <TELL "There are no stairs leading down." CR>)>)>>
replacements.new:
(T
		      <TELL "slightly ajar." CR>)>
	       <HOUSE-STATE-PROJECT ,KITCHEN>
	       <KITCHEN-PROJECT>)
	      (<EQUAL? .RARG ,M-ENTER>
	       <HOUSE-STATE-ENTER ,KITCHEN>)
	      (<==? .RARG ,M-BEG>
	       <COND (<KITCHEN-BEGIN> <RTRUE>)
		     (<AND <VERB? CLIMB-UP> <EQUAL? ,PRSO ,STAIRS>>
		      <DO-WALK ,P?UP>)
		     (<AND <VERB? CLIMB-UP> <EQUAL? ,PRSO ,STAIRS>>
		      <TELL "There are no stairs leading down." CR>)>)
	      (<EQUAL? .RARG ,M-END>
	       <KITCHEN-END>)>>
